fields.label: EE State ID
fields.description: EasyEcom internal state id. The write-side identifier — the §8.2 push uses this value for `billingStateId` / `dispatchStateId` (int). UNIQUE at the DB level. Note: EE historically duplicates some states across legacy + merged admin units (e.g. Daman & Diu as id 35 and the merged 'Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu' as id 3848). The resolver prefers the LARGEST id for the same name (best-fit for the current administrative unit).

fields.label: State Name
fields.description: Canonical state name as EE returns it. The resolver's case-insensitive lookup key. On update push, EE expects the state NAME (not id) under `billingState` / `dispatchState`.

fields.label: Country
fields.description: Link to the parent EasyEcom Country row. The discover flow looks up the country docname via country_id before inserting the state.

fields.label: EE Country ID
fields.description: EE's country_id from the state response. Stored for fast filtering during resolve_state(name, country_id) without a JOIN.

fields.label: Pincode Range
fields.description: EE returns 2-3 digit prefix ranges (e.g. Karnataka 56-59 means pincodes starting with 56, 57, 58, 59). A null zip_end_range means single-prefix (zip_start_range only). validate_pincode_state() uses these for soft-flag validation (mismatch is Created-Flagged, not hard-block).

fields.label: Zip Start Prefix
fields.description: 2-3 digit numeric prefix that marks the start of this state's pincode range.

fields.label: Zip End Prefix
fields.description: 2-3 digit numeric prefix that marks the end of this state's pincode range. Null means single-prefix state (validate_pincode_state treats null as equal to start).

fields.label: Postal Code (2-letter)
fields.description: 2-letter state code (e.g. 'KA' for Karnataka, 'AR' for Arunachal Pradesh). EE's `postal_code` field.

fields.label: Zone
fields.description: EE's geographic zone classification (e.g. 'South', 'North East'). Informational; not used in resolver logic.
